ksa_text: Create, maintain, and update enterprise data catalogs, asset registries, and metadata documentation to support data governance.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-008 (Data Quality/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.422, highest: DCWF at 0.422). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Records management: retention schedules, archival processes, destruction workflows, regulatory records requirements, and records system administration.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.422, and Data Quality (DQ) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Quality KSA (composite 0.422)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Records Manager job postings does not surface this Data Quality competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
